---
name: Skill Improvement
about: Suggest an improvement to an existing skill
title: '[IMPROVEMENT] '
labels: improvement
assignees: ''
---

## Skill

**Skill name:** (e.g. `ros2-build`, `ros2-create-node`)

## Current behavior

What the skill does today that could be better.

## Proposed improvement

What should change and why.

## Use case

What workflow or scenario does this improvement unlock?

## Implementation notes

Any specific ideas for how to implement this in the SKILL.md.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested the current skill and confirmed the limitation
- [ ] The improvement does not break existing behavior
